nasb.text: So he approached her, and the woman said, “Are you Joab?” And he answered, “I am.” Then she said to him, “Listen to the words of your maidservant.” And he answered, “I am listening.”

esv.text: And he came near her, and the woman said, “Are you Joab?” He answered, “I am.” Then she said to him, “Listen to the words of your servant.” And he answered, “I am listening.”

cnv.text: 約押走近婦人那裡，婦人問：“你是約押嗎？”他回答：“我是。”婦人對他說：“請聽婢女的話！”他說：“我正在聽！”

ccb.text: 约押就走上前去，那妇人问道：“你是约押吗？”约押答道：“我就是。”妇人说：“请听婢女说几句。”约押说：“你说吧！”
